name: Amazon sellers processing 10–20 invoices/month tool
description: For Amazon sellers processing 10–20 invoices/month, poor tracking of procurement spend causes missed discounts. We provide a procurement spend tracker instead of manual tracking through spreadsheets.
problem_solved: Difficulty in tracking procurement spend and managing contract renewals.

locked_fields.primary_problem: Difficulty in tracking procurement spend and managing contract renewals.
locked_fields.mvp_wedge: For Amazon sellers processing 10–20 invoices/month, poor tracking of procurement spend causes missed discounts. We provide a procurement spend tracker instead of manual tracking through spreadsheets.
